message:
feat(ci): drive smoke gate entirely from artifact contract in profiles JSON

The CI smoke gate previously hardcoded artifact paths (lean-smoke/),
retention days, routing policy, and TTFR targets directly in the workflow
YAML. This made the CI workflow and the profiles JSON diverge silently
when either was updated independently.

Refactor the smoke gate into two steps:
1. "Resolve Lean smoke artifact contract" — extracts artifact_name,
   artifact_dir, retention_days, routing_policy, ttfr_target_minutes,
   and failure_payload from the smoke profile in ci_verification_profiles.json,
   validates each field, and exports them as step outputs.
2. "Run Lean smoke profile commands" — consumes the resolved contract
   outputs instead of hardcoded values.

The failure payload step, artifact upload, and summary emission all now
reference contract outputs, eliminating every hardcoded lean-smoke/ path.

Also adds jq `// empty` fallback guards to the full gate's artifact
contract resolution for failure_payload, ensuring graceful defaults
when optional fields are absent.

The CI verification profile tests are updated to match:
- Smoke gate tests now check for the split-step contract resolution
  pattern and `// empty` jq fallback syntax
- Full gate tests verify contract output references instead of
  hardcoded paths

Changes:
- .github/workflows/ci.yml: new lean_smoke_contract step with full
  field extraction and validation, all downstream steps use outputs
- tests/lean_ci_verification_profiles.rs: updated snippet assertions
  for smoke and full gate contract patterns, #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -75,30 +75,82 @@ jobs:
             target
           key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-lean-smoke-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
 
-      - name: Run Lean smoke profile commands
+      - name: Resolve Lean smoke artifact contract
+        id: lean_smoke_contract
         shell: bash
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail
-          mkdir -p lean-smoke
 
           profile_file="formal/lean/coverage/ci_verification_profiles.json"
           if [[ ! -f "$profile_file" ]]; then
             echo "::error::Missing $profile_file"
             exit 1
           fi
 
+          profile_json="$(jq -c '.profiles[] | select(.name == "smoke")' "$profile_file")"
+          if [[ -z "$profile_json" || "$profile_json" == "null" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Missing smoke profile in $profile_file"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+          artifact_name="$(jq -r '.artifact_bundle.name // empty' <<<"$profile_json")"
+          artifact_dir="$(jq -r '.artifact_bundle.directory // empty' <<<"$profile_json")"
+          retention_days="$(jq -r '.artifact_bundle.retention_days // empty' <<<"$profile_json")"
+          routing_policy="$(jq -r '.profiles[] | select(.name == "smoke") | .triage.routing_policy // empty' "$profile_file")"
+          ttfr_target_minutes="$(jq -r '.profiles[] | select(.name == "smoke") | .triage.ttfr_target_minutes // empty' "$profile_file")"
+          failure_payload_default="lean-smoke/failure_payload.json"
+          failure_payload_path="$(jq -r '.artifact_bundle.failure_payload // empty' <<<"$profile_json")"
+          if [[ -z "$failure_payload_path" ]]; then
+            failure_payload_path="$failure_payload_default"
+          fi
+
+          if [[ -z "$artifact_name" || -z "$artifact_dir" || -z "$failure_payload_path" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Smoke artifact contract is missing name/directory/failure_payload"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+          if [[ ! "$retention_days" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Smoke retention_days must be numeric, got: $retention_days"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+          if [[ ! "$ttfr_target_minutes" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Smoke ttfr_target_minutes must be numeric, got: $ttfr_target_minutes"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+          if [[ -z "$routing_policy" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Smoke triage.routing_policy must be non-empty"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+
+          {
+            printf 'profile_file=%s\n' "$profile_file"
+            printf 'artifact_name=%s\n' "$artifact_name"
+            printf 'artifact_dir=%s\n' "$artifact_dir"
+            printf 'retention_days=%s\n' "$retention_days"
+            printf 'routing_policy=%s\n' "$routing_policy"
+            printf 'ttfr_target_minutes=%s\n' "$ttfr_target_minutes"
+            printf 'failure_payload=%s\n' "$failure_payload_path"
+          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+
+      - name: Run Lean smoke profile commands
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          artifact_dir="${{ steps.lean_smoke_contract.outputs.artifact_dir }}"
+          profile_file="${{ steps.lean_smoke_contract.outputs.profile_file }}"
+          mkdir -p "$artifact_dir"
+
           mapfile -t smoke_commands < <(jq -r '.profiles[] | select(.name == "smoke") | .commands[]' "$profile_file")
           if [[ "${#smoke_commands[@]}" -eq 0 ]]; then
             echo "::error::Smoke profile has no commands"
             exit 1
           fi
 
-          printf '%s\n' "${smoke_commands[@]}" > lean-smoke/commands.txt
+          printf '%s\n' "${smoke_commands[@]}" > "$artifact_dir/commands.txt"
 
           for cmd in "${smoke_commands[@]}"; do
             echo ">>> $cmd"
             if ! bash -lc "$cmd"; then
-              printf '%s\n' "$cmd" > lean-smoke/failed_command.txt
+              printf '%s\n' "$cmd" > "$artifact_dir/failed_command.txt"
               exit 1
             fi
           done
@@ -108,16 +160,21 @@ jobs:
         shell: bash
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail
-          mkdir -p lean-smoke
+          artifact_dir="${{ steps.lean_smoke_contract.outputs.artifact_dir }}"
+          routing_policy="${{ steps.lean_smoke_contract.outputs.routing_policy }}"
+          ttfr_target_minutes="${{ steps.lean_smoke_contract.outputs.ttfr_target_minutes }}"
+          failure_payload_path="${{ steps.lean_smoke_contract.outputs.failure_payload }}"
+          mkdir -p "$artifact_dir"
 
-          failed_cmd="$(cat lean-smoke/failed_command.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")"
+          failed_cmd="$(cat "$artifact_dir/failed_command.txt" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")"
           frontier_file="formal/lean/coverage/lean_frontier_buckets_v1.json"
           issues_file=".beads/issues.jsonl"
-          ttfr_target_minutes=30
 
           if [[ -f "$frontier_file" ]]; then
             jq \
               --arg failed_command "$failed_cmd" \
+              --arg routing_policy "$routing_policy" \
+              --arg failure_payload_path "$failure_payload_path" \
               --argjson ttfr_target_minutes "$ttfr_target_minutes" \
               --slurpfile issues "$issues_file" '
               def owners_for_bead($id):
@@ -140,11 +197,11 @@ jobs:
                   });
               {
               profile: "smoke",
-              routing_policy: "bead-owner-v1",
+              routing_policy: $routing_policy,
               ttfr_target_minutes: $ttfr_target_minutes,
               failed_command: $failed_command,
               first_action_checklist: [
-                "Open lean-smoke/failure_payload.json and identify bucket_id + primary_owner",
+                ("Open " + $failure_payload_path + " and identify bucket_id + primary_owner"),
                 "Run the failed command locally in the same commit to confirm repro",
                 "Route to primary_owner and linked_bead_ids with artifact path + repro command",
                 "If owner is unassigned, claim the top linked bead and post triage note"
@@ -174,14 +231,15 @@ jobs:
                   ]
                 }
               ]
-            }' "$frontier_file" > lean-smoke/failure_payload.json
+            }' "$frontier_file" > "$failure_payload_path"
           else
             jq -n \
               --arg failed_command "$failed_cmd" \
+              --arg routing_policy "$routing_policy" \
               --argjson ttfr_target_minutes "$ttfr_target_minutes" \
               '{
               profile: "smoke",
-              routing_policy: "bead-owner-v1",
+              routing_policy: $routing_policy,
               ttfr_target_minutes: $ttfr_target_minutes,
               failed_command: $failed_command,
               first_action_checklist: [
@@ -190,14 +248,14 @@ jobs:
                 "Route manually to owning bead(s) based on failure mode"
               ],
               error: "missing formal/lean/coverage/lean_frontier_buckets_v1.json"
-            }' > lean-smoke/failure_payload.json
+            }' > "$failure_payload_path"
           fi
 
           {
             echo "## Lean Smoke Failure Payload"
             echo
             echo "- Failed command: \`$failed_cmd\`"
-            echo "- Payload artifact: \`lean-smoke/failure_payload.json\`"
+            echo "- Payload artifact: \`$failure_payload_path\`"
             if [[ -f "$frontier_file" ]]; then
               echo
               echo "| Bucket | Count | Gap IDs | Bead IDs |"
@@ -210,9 +268,9 @@ jobs:
         if: always()
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
-          name: lean-smoke-artifacts
-          path: lean-smoke/
-          retention-days: 30
+          name: ${{ steps.lean_smoke_contract.outputs.artifact_name }}
+          path: ${{ steps.lean_smoke_contract.outputs.artifact_dir }}/
+          retention-days: ${{ fromJSON(steps.lean_smoke_contract.outputs.retention_days) }}
 
   lean-full:
     name: Lean Full Gate (Main/Release)
@@ -259,7 +317,11 @@ jobs:
           ttfr_target_minutes="$(jq -r '.triage.ttfr_target_minutes // empty' <<<"$profile_json")"
           repro_bundle_manifest="$(jq -r '.artifact_bundle.repro_bundle_manifest // empty' <<<"$profile_json")"
           repro_script="$(jq -r '.artifact_bundle.repro_script // empty' <<<"$profile_json")"
+          failure_payload_default="lean-full/failure_payload.json"
           failure_payload_path="$(jq -r '.artifact_bundle.failure_payload // empty' <<<"$profile_json")"
+          if [[ -z "$failure_payload_path" ]]; then
+            failure_payload_path="$failure_payload_default"
+          fi
 
           if [[ -z "$manifest_schema_version" || -z "$artifact_name" || -z "$artifact_dir" ]]; then
             echo "::error::Full artifact contract is missing manifest schema/name/directory"

@@ -113,6 +113,7 @@ fn ci_profiles_have_required_shape_and_ordering() {
 }
 
 #[test]
+#[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)]
 fn ci_artifact_contract_schema_and_retention_policy_are_explicit() {
     let profiles: Value = serde_json::from_str(PROFILES_JSON).expect("profiles json must parse");
     let artifact_contract = profiles
@@ -537,8 +538,10 @@ fn lean_smoke_failure_payload_routes_to_owners_deterministically() {
     for required_snippet in [
         ".beads/issues.jsonl",
         "Resolve Lean smoke artifact contract",
-        ".profiles[] | select(.name == \"smoke\") | .triage.routing_policy",
-        ".profiles[] | select(.name == \"smoke\") | .triage.ttfr_target_minutes",
+        ".profiles[] | select(.name == \"smoke\")",
+        ".triage.routing_policy",
+        ".triage.ttfr_target_minutes",
+        ".artifact_bundle.failure_payload",
         "ttfr_target_minutes",
         "owner_candidates",
         "routed_owners",
@@ -558,9 +561,9 @@ fn lean_smoke_gate_is_pr_scoped_and_profile_driven() {
         "Lean Smoke Gate (PR)",
         "if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'",
         "select(.name == \"smoke\")",
-        ".artifact_bundle.name",
-        ".artifact_bundle.directory",
-        ".artifact_bundle.retention_days",
+        ".artifact_bundle.name // empty",
+        ".artifact_bundle.directory // empty",
+        ".artifact_bundle.retention_days // empty",
         "Run Lean smoke profile commands",
         "Upload Lean smoke artifacts",
         "steps.lean_smoke_contract.outputs.artifact_name",
@@ -578,16 +581,16 @@ fn lean_full_gate_emits_repro_bundle_and_routing_contract() {
     for required_snippet in [
         "Lean Full Gate (Main/Release)",
         "Resolve Lean full artifact contract",
-        ".artifact_contract.manifest_schema_version",
+        ".artifact_contract.manifest_schema_version // empty",
         "select(.name == \"full\")",
-        ".artifact_bundle.repro_bundle_manifest",
-        ".artifact_bundle.repro_script",
-        ".artifact_bundle.failure_payload",
+        ".artifact_bundle.repro_bundle_manifest // empty",
+        ".artifact_bundle.repro_script // empty",
+        ".artifact_bundle.failure_payload // empty",
         ".triage.routing_policy",
         ".triage.ttfr_target_minutes",
-        "lean-full/repro_bundle_manifest.json",
-        "lean-full/repro_commands.sh",
-        "lean-full/failure_payload.json",
+        "steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.repro_bundle_manifest",
+        "steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.repro_script",
+        "steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.failure_payload",
         "Upload Lean full artifacts",
         "steps.lean_full_contract.outputs.artifact_name",
     ] {
